zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

decisions_approved.HD-001_scope: Build to actual current OBBBA law ($15M permanent exemption); NOT the PRD's repealed-TCJA-sunset framing. ASM-003 from meta-attractor-record is hereby INVALIDATED and superseded by FACT-OBBBA-001 (see knowledge-graph update).
decisions_approved.HD-002_brand: Working title 'EstateCompass'; internal AI 'Sage'. No use of registered wealth.com marks.
decisions_approved.HD-003_stack: Node 20 + TypeScript + Fastify; React 18 + Vite + Tailwind; Postgres 16 + pgvector; Python 3.12 + FastAPI for AI service; Anthropic Claude for extraction; Playwright; Vitest + Pytest.
decisions_approved.HD-004_deployment: Docker Compose local-only at v0; production_surface=false; deferred-stage waivers for release/operations/production_drill remain in force.
decisions_approved.HD-005_budget: Token SWAG approved: low 150K, mid 400K, high 1.2M tokens for full multi-day run. Reapproval triggers active at +15% delta / scope change / threshold reduction / surface-flag change / real-partner integration / brand change / threshold reduction below 96% per expert.
decisions_approved.HD-006_integrations: Mock 17 of 19 partners; real-shape contract+mock for Plaid-substitute and one Schwab-shape custody adapter.
decisions_approved.HD-007_upl: AI emits 'educational drafts for attorney review' only; attorney-of-record assignment required before any execution-ready legal document; legal-disclaimer overlay enforced; refusal rule locked in generated-meta-skill-contract.json.
decisions_approved.HD-008_synthetic_data: Synthetic data only at v0; no real PII or PHI.
decisions_approved.HD-009_hawkeye_independence: Hawkeye runs as separate subagent given only artifact files (no chat-context handoff). Already enforced for HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent.

domain_findings_acknowledged_by_default_: FACT-OBBBA-001 (OBBBA July 4 2025 permanently raised federal estate/gift/GST exemption to $15M; TCJA sunset repealed) — accepted as project context.
FACT-NYDFS-PART500-2025 (NYDFS Part 500 amendments effective Nov 1 2025; first cert April 15 2026) — added to standards baseline.
FACT-ADMT-CCPA-2027 (CCPA/CPRA ADMT rules effective Jan 1 2027) — added to compliance scope for AI recommendation transparency.
FACT-MT-CT-GLBA-2025 (Montana and Connecticut eliminated GLBA entity-level exemption 2025) — added to state-by-state compliance.
FACT-YODLEE-STG-2025 (Yodlee sold by Envestnet to STG 2025) — adapter context note.
Lesson L-002 (cross-source reconciliation required even for live-capture artifacts) and L-003 (orchestrator prompts must not invent specifics) accepted into df-feedback-learning.

dark_factory_delivery_owner: claude-opus-4-7 orchestrator running df-meta-attractor + dark-factory-orchestrator skill chain

in_scope: Wealth.com clone implementation across the 14 surfaces inventoried in wealth_com_PRD_artifacts.md §1 (Homepage / Document Creation / Scenario Builder / Ester AI / Tax Planning / Platform Overview / Integrations / Pricing / For Advisors / For Enterprises / For Attorneys / For Trust Companies / About / Features Overview).

Core entity model from PRD §9: Household, People & Entities, Holdings & Assets, Financial Accounts, Insurance & Liabilities, Documents & Records, Tax Profile & Forms, Plans & Recommendations, Activity & Audit, Tasks.
Five core workflows: Estate Drafting, Estate Scan/Extract (Ester), Tax Baseline, Scenario Builder, Reports.
Trust strategies: GRAT, SLAT, ILIT, CLAT, Dynasty, Revocable Living, QPRT, IDGT, CRT/CRUT.
19+ integration adapters (per PRD): mocked at v0 except 2 real-shape (Plaid-substitute, Schwab-shape).
AI capabilities: Ester-substitute extractor (LLM + deterministic-calc layer), executive summarization, tax baseline, scenario projection.
Compliance posture: SOC 2 Type II controls designed (audit out of scope), GLBA, CCPA/CPRA, multi-tenant isolation, encryption, RBAC, audit log.
Reporting: Executive Summary, Standalone Visual Report, Estate Report PDF, Form 706/709 worksheet exports.
Project book: BRD, SRS, NFR catalog, HLD, LLD per bounded context, ADR set, DDD ubiquitous-language map, trace matrix, test plans, runbooks (deferred), quality certificates.
Hawkeye conformance audits at every stage exit and at run closure.
Transfer-test bead validating factory generalization to a second workload.
out_of_scope: SOC 2 audit engagement, third-party pen test, formal legal opinion.
Live customer onboarding, marketing pages, sales process.
Use of registered wealth.com marks (Ester®, Family Office Suite™, EstateFlow™, Heritage Map, Plan for Every Tomorrow™).
Live regulatory filings or use with real client PII.
assumptions: Multi-session run with df-context-memory for resume safety.
Subagent-driven research and authoring are billed against client token budget.
AI personas as elite-role contracts substitute for human reviewers per skill-system allowance.
Synthetic data only at v0; no real PII/PHI.
scope_baseline.acceptance_definition: Run accepted when: (a) all surface flags' tests pass per SDLC matrix, (b) all stages exited with Hawkeye conformance audit pass, (c) transfer-test bead closes with factory generalization proven, (d) retrospective + skill-system update PRs drafted, (e) final Hawkeye audit issues run-closure certificate, (f) client_owner acknowledges deliverable.

standards_baseline: WCAG 2.1 AA (target AAA for client portal)

stage_6_construction_9_slices.note: Heavy band given regulated AI-heavy workload

token_budget.swag_breakdown_note: Per-stage SWAG sum exceeds the overall low/mid/high band because the overall band is the FINAL approved range; per-stage adds parallelism savings via subagent dispatch and assumes ~40% of construction slices proceed without rework. Reconciliation: actual run will reapproval-trigger if cumulative spend approaches mid band overall.
assumptions: Subagent dispatches counted in their own budgets and sum into orchestrator total.
RALPH 5-loop overhead estimated at +30% of artifact-base.
Each construction slice may require 1-2 RALPH cycles before pass.
Hawkeye audit per stage runs as separate subagent with bounded budget.
exclusions: User wall-clock time for checkpoint review.

client_checkpoints.name: Construction mid-point
decision_items: confirm slice 4 Ester extractor F1 acceptable
confirm slice 5 calc engine matches golden dataset

change_control.rebaseline_trigger: Any change request that exceeds +15% token forecast OR amends scope_in/scope_out OR changes surface flags OR amends acceptance definition.
